name: x402 Data Bazaar
description: Document generation (DOCX/XLSX/PDF), Monte Carlo simulation, and compliance screening (OFAC/sanctions/vendor due diligence).
instructions:
# x402 Data Bazaar

Real-world data APIs for AI and agentic workflows. Pay per request with USDC on Base.

## Core Legacy Endpoints
- VIN decode, weather decision briefs, FX conversion, holidays/business days, IP geolocation, nutrition, FDA recalls/adverse events, census population, BLS CPI/unemployment, AQI, congress bills.

## Expanded Endpoint Families
- Finance: stock quotes/search/candles, treasury rates, fed funds rate, yield curve.
- Government & Macro: BLS jobs/wages/PCE, census housing/income/age.
- FDA: drug labels, device events/recalls, NDC lookups, path alias for drug events.
- Weather: historical, alerts, marine, UV, AQI alias route.
- Location: geocode, reverse geocode, timezone, zipcode, elevation.
- Domain Intelligence: whois/rdap, dns, ssl cert, domain availability.
- Legal/Regulatory: SEC filings/company facts/insider trades, sanctions, court cases/opinions.
- Sports: scores, standings, schedules, odds.
- World Data: World Bank indicators, country profiles, patent search.

## Payment
USDC on Base via x402 v2. Paid endpoints return 402 with machine-readable payment requirements until settled.

## Discovery
Use GET /api for machine-readable catalog entries, canonical example URLs, pricing metadata, and route-level payment specs.
